wiki.summary: “Punk Tactics' is the seventh song from alternative-rap duo Joey Valence & Brae. Produced by Joey Valence and Patrick Nissley, the song features a prominent brass sample that escalates throughout the song to build tension. The combination of this sample, boom bap-style drums and aggressive hardcore-style lyrics create for a high-energy mood. The song’s dramatic intro has been the cause for numerous trends and edits resulting in the song and the duo’s rise in popularity. Read more on Last.fm.
